sections.title: We’re at the forefront of integrating AI to not just work faster, but to work smarter.

content.text: We’re at the forefront of integrating AI to not just work faster, but to work smarter. It’s our responsibility as organizational leaders to ensure that this technology elevates our teams’ creativity and aligns with our ethical values.”

Karim R. Lakhani
Chair, Digital Data Design Institute at Harvard and
Dorothy & Michael Hintze Professor of Business Administration at Harvard Business School
Microsoft Work Trend Index, 2024

Microsoft Teams Premium
INTELLIGENT COLLABORATION
Leverage AI to break down language barriers and support global teamwork
Live translation of transcript
AI powered translation supports over 40 languages
Live translation of captions
Empower all participants to engage in the discussion

elements.alt: Screenshot of Teams meeting showing live translated transcripts and captions in multiple languages

content.text:
Microsoft Teams Premium
INTELLIGENT COLLABORATION
Make the meetings and calls you attend (and miss) more productive and impactful with AI

Notes & tasks
Save time capturing takeaways and action items

Timeline markers
Personalized to the recording events most relevant to you

Chapters & topics
Help you quickly navigate to the information you want to review

elements.alt: Screenshot of Teams Intelligent Recap showing notes, tasks, timeline markers, and chapters

content.text: Note: AI generated notes and tasks are created for transcribed calls and for meetings that are recorded or transcribed. Other intelligent recap features may require the meeting to be recorded and are not supported for calls.

sections.title: Teams Premium includes built-in summaries with intelligent recap

elements.text: Teams Premium includes built-in summaries with intelligent recap. Microsoft 365 Copilot license will also include intelligent recap but expands on it with the ability to ask any question about the meeting or call

content.text: Intelligent recap: Built-in and automated, Standardized, Video, speaker, and chapter markers, Available after meeting only
Microsoft 365 Copilot: On-demand, Based on unique prompts, Conversational interaction, with citations, Available real-time (during and after meeting)

sections.title: Amanda uses intelligent recap to understand the key highlights

elements.text: Amanda uses intelligent recap to understand the key highlights of a missed meeting, then uses Copilot to progress her next steps

content.text: First, Amanda skims the highlights on the Recap tab such as AI-generated notes and suggested tasks.
She notices a task was assigned to her
She uses name mentions and speaker markers to hear about the task directly. And reviews the content shared using screenshare markers and Chapters.
In order to start making progress on her task, she asks Copilot to organize the options discussed into a pros and cons table

The table helps Amanda identify her preferred route, but she is curious how the rest of the team feels about that option. She asks Copilot how did the team react to option 2 to get a better sense of their sentiments during the meeting.

sections.title: How your organization benefits from M365 Copilot and Teams Premium

content.text: Key scenarios

Microsoft 365 Copilot
Unleash creativity and productivity
High usage across different Microsoft 365 apps (Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, etc)
Create, edit, or review content frequently
Pull together information from multiple sources often
Analyze data or identify insights
Often creates or reviews content across Microsoft 365 apps
Frequently attends meetings or is often double booked for meetings

Microsoft Teams Premium
Modernize collaboration and communication for the next digital era
Works hybrid across in-office and remote locations
Communicates frequently with partners or customers outside the organization
Connects with clients and other employees who speak different languages
Needs to share confidential or regulated information in meetings or appointments
Facilitates and manage webinars or internal all-hands meetings
Schedules and runs virtual appointments
Teams Premium

sections.title: Teams Premium reimagines flexible work with Microsoft Places—now generally available!

elements.alt: Diagram showing Teams Premium features surrounding Microsoft Teams Premium core. Categories include Rich Engagements, Intelligent Collaboration, and Advanced Protection & Management. Features include Language Translation, AI Recaps, Content Protections, Advanced Collaboration Controls, Advanced Bookings, Mesh Immersive, Queues App, and Advanced Events. Also mentions Microsoft Places NEW as an AI-powered workplace app.

content.text:
Microsoft Teams Premium
The smart place to work
AI-powered workplace app
Microsoft Places NEW

R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Places in Teams Premium
Understand leadership and team guidance about when and why to come into the office

elements.alt: Screenshot of Teams Premium interface showing team day guidance and office attendance schedules.

content.text:
R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Places in Teams Premium
Using Places Finder, make room and desk booking decisions with additional data: images of the space, floorplans, information about technology available.

elements.alt: Screenshot of Places Finder in Teams Premium showing an interactive floorplan and available desks and neighborhoods.

content.text:
R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Places in Teams Premium
Get recommendations on available rooms for all your meetings for the day– and quickly book them all at once

elements.alt: Screenshot of Outlook calendar showing intelligent room suggestions for multiple meetings on a selected day.

content.text:
R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Places in Teams Premium
Receive actionable insights and explanations of data with Copilot to make better facility decisions

elements.alt: Screenshot of Microsoft Places space analytics dashboard showing building attendance charts and a Copilot-generated text explanation of the trends.

content.text: * - Requires an M365 Copilot license

R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Microsoft Teams Premium
Build your brand into every interaction

elements.alt: Screenshot of a Teams meeting pre-join screen featuring custom company branding, logo, and background colors.

content.text: Branded join lobby: See the logo and colors of your company when attendees join.
Org backgrounds: Ensure a professional look-and-feel through brand-approved backgrounds
Custom together modes: Incorporate your brand into more fun and personalized ways to meet

R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Microsoft Teams Premium
Host and deliver large-scale, professionally produced employee events to drive meaningful connections across your organization

elements.alt: Screenshot of an Advanced Town Hall event in Teams, showing live video feeds, presentation slides, and a Q&A panel.

content.text: High capacity: Invite and host up to 20K attendees
Custom emails: Entice your audience to attend and personalize the post-event recording email
Real-time insights: Monitor the performance to ensure a seamless experience
Microsoft eCDN: Ensure high-quality video connectivity

R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Microsoft Teams Premium
Host high-quality webinars using advanced functionality to drive deeper engagement and generate new leads

elements.alt: Screenshot of a Teams webinar showing video streams of presenters alongside presentation slides.

content.text: Registration: Manage demand with waitlist and manual approvals
Hide attendees: Enhance privacy by hiding attendee names
RTMP-in: Delivery dynamic content by streaming different media types
Measure engagement: Assess how content performed with engagement analytics reports

R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Microsoft Teams Premium
Facilitate personalized business-to-customer interactions across the full appointment experience

elements.alt: Screenshot showing Microsoft Bookings dashboard and a mobile device displaying an SMS appointment reminder.

content.text: Appointment management: Enable one queue view of scheduled appointments
SMS reminders: Reduce no-shows with option to send out mobile reminders*
*SMS notifications are supported in select geographies

R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Microsoft Teams Premium
Enhanced customer communications with advanced call queue handling

elements.alt: Queues App interface in Teams showing quick access to queues, service levels, waiting calls, and analytics.

content.text: Reduce wait times with efficient call handling
Employees make and receive customer calls in the flow of work
Improve team and queue performance with delegated administration
Identify service improvement opportunities

R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Microsoft Teams Premium
Create your own custom immersive experiences and solutions.

elements.alt: Avatars in a Microsoft Mesh virtual auditorium watching a presentation screen.

content.text: Invite and host up to 200 attendees
Tailor a preset environment or build a new experience
Orchestrate unique, dynamic experiences with event production capabilities.
Teams Premium

P R O T E C T I O N & M A N A G E M E N T
Microsoft Teams Premium
Safeguard confidential information exchanged in meetings

elements.alt: Teams new meeting details and options dialog showing Sensitivity labels, 'Who can record', and 'Apply a watermark to shared content' settings.

content.text: Automate setup of meeting protection options**
Prevent unauthorized meeting recordings and transcriptions
Deter leaks of shared content
Enable additional privacy protections*

*Teams protects your data with encryption in transit and at rest for all meetings
**Customers with an E5 license or E5 compliance

P R O T E C T I O N & M A N A G E M E N T
Microsoft Teams Premium
Empower administrators with refined control and in-depth insights

elements.alt: Microsoft Teams admin center dashboard showing collaboration activity, inactive domains, and teams with external guest activity.

content.text: Reduce sprawl and mitigate risks of information leakage
Drill into detailed views and track trends over time

P R O T E C T I O N & M A N A G E M E N T
Microsoft Teams Premium
Ensure quality experiences with real-time meeting performance insights and advanced reporting

elements.alt: Microsoft Teams admin center Rules page displaying alerts for audio, video, and application sharing quality for in-progress meetings.

content.text: Proactively monitor meeting quality to identify and address audio, video and app-sharing related issues while the meeting is in progress.

content.text:
Not an exhaustive list of AI capabilities.
Note: AI generated notes and tasks are created for transcribed calls and for meetings that are recorded or transcribed. Other intelligent recap features may require the meeting to be recorded and are not supported for calls.
All licenses include Commercial Data Protection and Microsoft 365 Security, Privacy, and Compliance.
